chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: In the last video we saw everything about Dictionary  How to make a dictionary  What is the importance of Dictionary in Python Programming Language  In this video I would like to talk about Dictionary Methods  Let's go to the computer screen and let's get started

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: Intro  Some of the methods of Dictionary are very useful  One of the methods is update  Which is used to update the dictionary  Let's say I have some employee ID's

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: And their performances  I write employee or ep  I will make a simple name of the dictionary  Let's say I have some employee ID's  Let's say it is 1 to 2 and its performance is 45 out of 100

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: And 1 to 3 and its performance is 89 out of 100  And I have one more employee ID and its performance is 69 out of 100  And 670 is another employee ID  Its performance is also 69 out of 100  So what is happening is that we have stored the performance of many people in a variable

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: Now let's say another person comes and he is also a manager  He says according to my database  I have some other employee ID's  Like 2 to 2 employee ID's performance is 67  566 employee ID's performance is 90

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: So now they decide to do one thing  Because he is a senior manager  EP1 is a senior manager  He says EP2 you are junior than me  You give me all your ratings and I will store them in my database

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: So EP1 says ok sir no problem  Sorry it is EP2 not EP1  EP1 is a senior I forget  EP2 says ok sir you take all my ratings  So what will EP1 do?

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: EP1 will update itself with the values and key value pairs  I should say items of EP2  So if I run this method once  So I just need to run  And once I will print EP1

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: So I will see that these two performances have also come in it  You can see 2 to 2 67 566 90 has also come  Now the set is unordered in python  You must know this  But the dictionary is ordered from python 3.7 onwards

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: So set unordered python dictionary ordered  So in this way we can use the update method  Now we can use the clear method to clear all the dictionaries  So if I do not do this here  If I say ep1.clear

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: So what will happen?  EP1 will be completely empty  And an empty dictionary will be printed here  How to make an empty dictionary?  If I do this

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: So this is an empty dictionary  So if I print the empty dictionary  So an empty dictionary will be printed  Similarly we have a pop method  Which removes the key value pairs

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: So if I show you here  If I say here ep1.pop122  So what I will do is  I will remove this key value pair  So see 123, 567 and 670

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: By the way, I will tell you  I have commented out the method of update  That's why you can't see the values  So by pop I can remove a key value pair  What does pop item do?

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: It removes the last key value pair from a dictionary  So what you have to do is  If you want this entry to be removed from ep1  So what you will do is  You will use pop item here

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: And you will write 670 here  What will happen by writing 670?  That your pop item method  Sorry I don't need to write 670  I will just write pop item

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: And automatically 670 will be removed from here  So you can see here  Now the print of ep1  There is no 670 in it  So I just need to write pop item

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: And my last key value pair  Will be removed from my dictionary  Again there is a del keyword  Which we saw in set  What does this del keyword do?

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: It deletes the whole dictionary  So if you have written del here  Suppose I have written here del ep1  Then I will get an error  Now line no.9 will say

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: What is ep1?  And it will give an error  That ep1 is not defined  So we can do such things with dictionary  So I will comment this

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: So that we don't get to see  This not defined error  If key is not provided  Then the del keyword will delete the dictionary  Entirely

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: If you didn't delete like this  By giving a key  Then the whole dictionary will be deleted  Like we did here  But if you give a key

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: You say that I want to delete 122  Sorry not 122 as a string  Because 122 is an integer  So I will write 122 like this  So the entry 122 colon 45

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: Will be deleted from my dictionary  What if I write it like this  As a string  I will say that if you delete 122  Then you will get a key error

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: Many people get confused in this  That 122 was in my dictionary  Why am I getting a key error?  So you are getting a key error  Because you are seeing 122 as a string

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: And as an integer  The key in ep1  Is as an integer  So you should know this  So I will do it again

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: So that the error doesn't come  I hope you understood this  So exactly the same things  Which we saw for list, tuple  Set, dictionary

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: There are some methods  There is a data type  It has some uses  Whenever you want to create a mapping of key value pairs  You do it

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: Many times when you work with database  With MongoDB, PyMongo  Because in that almost everything  Is like a dictionary  You have to use many methods

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: And when you solve  Actual real world problems  Like creating a website in Django  Or creating a NAPI in Flask  When you do that kind of work

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: Then you will know the actual usage of these things  And now you may have theories  Always  Keep doing something like this  Python, Dictionary

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: Documentation  If you do this kind of work  Then you read latest documentation  Here all methods are written  You can see

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: Here is the list, here is the dictionary  So you can see here  You can see some of the methods of dictionary  Which I may not have told you  So here

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: Actually this is the CAPI reference of dictionary  So let's close it  We want to see here  I will click here  You can read it

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: This is the source, this is the documentation  When Python is created  Then this thing is released  Wherever you see  It comes from here

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: So how about reading this  Or at least trying to read this  You can try  It's not like reading it like a book  You can read it from the middle

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: You can scroll through it  You can see if there is any method  Which I don't know  So try it  See what is that

chunks.title: Dictionary Methods in Python
chunks.text: Read about looping techniques  Once you know the basics  Your information will increase  As much as you know about dictionary  Your knowledge will increase
